name: Marketing
description: Build positioning, plan campaigns, write blog posts and landing pages, audit SEO and AI-search visibility, and draft email sequences. Strategy through execution across content, paid, social, and conversion copy - all drafts, never published.
author: Houston

agentSeeds..houston/routines/routines.json:
[{"id": "weekly-marketing-review", "name": "Monday marketing review", "description": "Every Monday morning: what did we ship last week, what's stale, what to do next  -  rolled up across positioning, SEO, email, social, paid, and copy.", "prompt": "Run the Monday marketing health review. Group by domain (Positioning, SEO, Email, Social, Paid, Copy). For each domain, surface (a) what shipped, (b) what's stale  -  things I started but didn't finish or haven't revisited in 3+ weeks, (c) the single most useful next move.

Write the review to analyses/marketing-health-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md and log it in outputs.json. Silent unless something needs attention.", "prompt": "Run the monthly SEO audit. Use the audit-a-surface skill with surface=site-seo.

Full on-page + technical audit of the domain in config/context-ledger.json (domains.seo.domain  -  ask if missing). Use the connected SEO tool (Semrush / Ahrefs / Firecrawl, in that order of preference). Score each finding by impact × ease. Compare against the most recent audit in audits/ so you can flag *new* issues vs. ones already reported.

Write the audit to audits/site-seo-{domain}-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md and log in outputs.json.

If no critical issues are new since the last audit (no broken pages, no ranking cliff, no meaningful score drift, no missing schema on key pages), end with ROUTINE_OK so this stays silent. Surface only when a new high-impact fix appeared or a regression was detected.
